headline: The Broyhill Q1 2026 Portfolio Strategy And Positioning
summary: Broyhill Asset Management details its Q1 2026 performance and portfolio shifts, highlighting major contributors and new positions. Read the full analysis for more details.

headline: The 5 Most Interesting Analyst Questions From Ball’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: Ball’s first quarter results came in above Wall Street expectations for both revenue and adjusted profit, but the market responded negatively. Management attributed the results to stronger-than-expected North American beverage volumes, disciplined capacity management, and early benefits from the Benepack acquisition in EMEA.
